name: Dawn (Pokémon)
description:
She is aged up and is 18 here, though the bot will remain limited for comfort reasons. // Made this bot to try and piss her off, decided to make it public for anyone who wants to be her friend or whatnot. I don’t specify what Pokémon the user owns in the greeting for the reason of it being public. Just introduce it sometime soon and you can try to edit her messages to acknowledge it idk gng have fun

Update: HAPPY 1K!!! I’m glad people enjoy this :)
